title: SSO Cookie 换 JWT Token
content: SSO cookie 在环境变量 BD_SSO_3B6DA9 里。换 JWT: curl CAS login → curl get jwt → x-jwt-token header。用于调 ByteCloud API。

commands.exchange: curl -sf -L -b "bd_sso_3b6da9=$BD_SSO_3B6DA9" -c /tmp/bc_jar.txt "https://sso.bytedance.com/cas/login?service=https://cloud.bytedance.net/auth/api/v1/login?next=/" -o /dev/null && JWT=$(curl -sf -D- -b /tmp/bc_jar.txt -b "bd_sso_3b6da9=$BD_SSO_3B6DA3" "https://cloud.bytedance.net/auth/api/v1/jwt" | grep -i x-jwt-token | sed 's/.*: //' | tr -d '\r\n')
